query:
SELECT tv.id, tn.fullName as teacher_name, s.fullName as student_name, tv.voteRank, tv.createdAt 
FROM teacher_votes tv 
JOIN teacher_names tn ON tv.teacherNameId = tn.id 
JOIN students s ON tv.studentId = s.id 
WHERE tv.votingPeriodId = (SELECT id FROM voting_periods WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY tv.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT tv.id, tn.fullName as teacher_name, s.fullName as student_name, tv.voteRank, tv.createdAt 
FROM teacher_votes tv 
JOIN teacher_names tn ON tv.teacherNameId = tn.id 
JOIN students s ON tv.studentId = s.id 
WHERE tv.votingPeriodId = (SELECT id FROM voting_periods WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY tv.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
